expectations.evidence: 'You have **Shotgun Surgery**' — explicitly named in the opening diagnosis.

expectations.text: Identifies 'Divergent Change' or 'Feature Envy' smell by name
expectations.evidence: Does not use 'Divergent Change' or 'Feature Envy'. Describes the same problem as 'Violation of Open/Closed Principle' instead. No Refactoring Guru smell taxonomy used.

expectations.text: Recommends Observer pattern as the primary solution
expectations.evidence: 'Fix is the Observer / Domain Event pattern' — clearly recommended.

expectations.text: Explains why Observer fits — publisher/subscriber model
expectations.evidence: 'UserService emits typed events (EMAIL_UPDATED, PASSWORD_CHANGED, etc.) — nothing else. Independent handlers subscribe.' Full EventBus implementation shown.

expectations.text: Explains how new channels are added without modifying UserService
expectations.evidence: 'Adding WhatsApp? → touch NotificationHandler only.' Clear extensibility explanation.

expectations.text: Suggests concrete steps or migration path
expectations.evidence: Goes directly to full rewrite (new UserService with EventBus). Does not mention Extract Method/Extract Class as incremental stepping stones to reduce risk during migration.
